# Circlet

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Rarity | Event |
| Class | Any |

## Description

Circlet is an Event Relic that is obtained when all other Relics have been collected.

## Notes

### Sources

Can only be obtained if all other relics that could spawn in a situation are within your possession.

## Update History

_None._
